Observed faults (as-of history)

HONEST: 2D equirectangular canvas; bounded :representative seed (not exhaustive); coords rounded to landing town. The kami-engine WASM 3D globe (kanae-style) is deferred. Live ingest G7 Council+operator gated. ADR-2606012600.
